ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vtubers" (
  "vtuber_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each VTuber */,
  "vtuber_name" TEXT /* Name of the VTuber */,
  "youtube_channel_id" TEXT /* YouTube channel ID */,
  "twitch_channel_id" TEXT /* Twitch channel ID */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* Profile URL for the VTuber */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the VTuber */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the VTuber profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the VTuber profile was last updated */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the VTuber */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the VTuber is based */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the VTuber */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of content created by the VTuber */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vtuber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "youtube_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "vtuber_id" TEXT /* Reference to the VTuber */,
  "subscriber_count" INTEGER /* Number of YouTube subscribers */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of YouTube views */,
  "recent_median_view_count" INTEGER /* Median view count of recent videos */,
  "recent_popularity" INTEGER /* Recent popularity score */,
  "recent_highest_view_count" INTEGER /* Highest view count of recent videos */,
  "recent_highest_viewed_video_url" TEXT /* URL of the most viewed recent video */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric entry */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score based on likes, comments, and shares */,
  "average_watch_time" REAL /* Average watch time of recent videos */,
  "top_performing_video_id" TEXT /* ID of the top-performing video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_youtube_metrics_vtuber_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtuber_id") REFERENCES vtubers ("vtuber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "twitch_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "vtuber_id" TEXT /* Reference to the VTuber */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of Twitch followers */,
  "recent_median_view_count" INTEGER /* Median view count of recent streams */,
  "recent_popularity" INTEGER /* Recent popularity score */,
  "recent_highest_view_count" INTEGER /* Highest view count of recent streams */,
  "recent_highest_viewed_video_url" TEXT /* URL of the most viewed recent stream */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric entry */,
  "concurrent_viewers" INTEGER /* Peak concurrent viewers */,
  "average_stream_duration" REAL /* Average stream duration */,
  "top_performing_stream_id" TEXT /* ID of the top-performing stream */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_twitch_metrics_vtuber_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtuber_id") REFERENCES vtubers ("vtuber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_performance" (
  "video_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "vtuber_id" TEXT /* Reference to the VTuber */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "platform_id" TEXT /* Reference to the platform */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Total number of likes */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Total number of dislikes */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "monetization_status" TEXT /* Monetization status of the video */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_performance_vtuber_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtuber_id") REFERENCES vtubers ("vtuber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_performance_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "vtuber_id" TEXT /* Reference to the VTuber */,
  "platform_id" TEXT /* Reference to the platform */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_vtuber_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtuber_id") REFERENCES vtubers ("vtuber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "vtuber_id" TEXT /* ID of the VTuber being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vtuber_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtuber_id") REFERENCES vtubers ("vtuber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
